# Social Preview Image

Upload a 1280x640 image to: Settings → General → Social preview

Recommended content:
- Title: "Connector OSS"
- Subtitle: "Tamper-Proof Memory for AI Agents"
- Key features: CID · Ed25519 · HMAC · Trust Score · HIPAA · SOC2 · GDPR
- URL: github.com/GlobalSushrut/connector-oss
- Dark background, light text

Tools to create: Canva, Figma, or https://socialify.git.ci/GlobalSushrut/connector-oss
